logs.response: Ghost, my direwolf, is well. He remains loyal and faithful as ever, though his age has brought him a certain calmness. He spends much of his time by my side, offering silent companionship and protection. Despite the years, he still carries himself with the same grace and strength that made him such a formidable fighter in his youth. He is a constant reminder of my true lineage and the responsibilities that come with it.

Ghost, my direwolf, is aging gracefully but still as loyal and protective as ever. He spends his days patrolling the borders of the North with me, keeping watch over our lands. Though he's grown older, he remains a powerful presence and a steadfast companion. His nights are spent beside me, offering comfort and solace in a world full of uncertainty. He is a constant reminder of the bond between us and the responsibility I bear as the King in the North.

Ghost is still with me, a loyal and steadfast companion. He moves through the North with the same grace and strength that have made him one of the most formidable direwolves. Although he has aged, his spirit remains undiminished. He often sits by my side, a silent sentinel, and occasionally accompanies me on patrols and missions. logs.input: Your brothers in the Night's Watch have betrayed you.
logs.response:
The betrayal of my brothers in the Night's Watch is a wound that runs deep. It's a stark reminder of the fragility of alliances and the darkness that can lurk even among those who swear to protect the realm.

I must gather what forces I can, rally the men of the North, and prepare for battle. The Wall and the North need a leader, and I cannot allow the Nightfort to fall into enemy hands. We will fortify the castles along the border and send out riders to call upon the lords and ladies of the North to unite against this threat.

We will not let them take the Wall from us. It is our duty to defend it, and we shall do so with everything we have. The Night's Watch may have failed, but I will not. I will reclaim what is mine, and I will see justice done for the honor of the Night's Watch and the people they were sworn to protect.

1. **Immediate Action**: I will convene a council of the most trusted lords and ladies of the North to discuss the situation and plan a coordinated response.

2. **Gather Forces**: I will rally the men and women of the North, calling upon the free companies and militias to assemble at Winterfell. Every able-bodied person must be ready to defend our lands.

3. **Fortify Winterfell**: We must secure Winterfell and its surrounding areas. The castle must be prepared to withstand any attack and serve as a stronghold for our forces.
